description: An ancient Indian practice uniting breath, movement, and mindfulness. Builds flexibility, balance, and body awareness through a progressive sequence of postures held with conscious breathing.

movements.name: Warrior I
movements.description: A standing lunge that builds strength, balance, and hip flexibility simultaneously. The back foot is angled at 45 degrees while the front knee tracks over the ankle; arms reach overhead with the ribcage lifted.

commonMistakes.description: Allowing the front knee to collapse inward

movements.name: Downward Dog
movements.description: An inverted V-shape that lengthens the entire posterior chain. Weight distributes between hands and feet; the sit-bones press toward the ceiling while the heels reach toward the floor.

commonMistakes.description: Rounding the lower back instead of hinging at the hips
